name: Nokta
description: Precision detection technology from Turkey, engineered for professionals and enthusiasts. Nokta detectors combine advanced multi-frequency IQ with rugged waterproof construction — the choice of both first-time hunters and seasoned prospectors.
metaDescription: Nokta detectors in Pakistan — Gold Kruzer, Legend, Simplex Ultra, and the full Nokta range from an authorized distributor.

showcase.tagline: Precision detection technology from Turkey, engineered for professionals and enthusiasts.
showcase.description: Precision detection technology from Turkey, engineered for professionals and enthusiasts. Nokta detectors combine advanced multi-frequency IQ with rugged waterproof construction — the choice of both first-time hunters and seasoned prospectors.

name: Minelab
description: Australia's premier detection company, pioneering the multi-frequency technology that changed gold prospecting. Minelab systems are the choice of professional prospectors, military organizations, and humanitarian demining programs — engineered to adapt to any terrain and mineralization level.
metaDescription: Minelab metal detectors in Pakistan — GPX 6000, Equinox 900, and the full Minelab range. Authorized distributor with local support.

showcase.tagline: Australia's premier detection technology company, pioneering multi-frequency innovation.
showcase.description: Minelab detectors are the choice of professional gold prospectors, military organizations, and humanitarian demining programs. Their patented multi-frequency technology adapts to any terrain and mineralization level.

name: GoldXtra
description: Specialist long-range locator manufacturer focused on deep-target detection over large search areas. GoldXtra systems combine directional discrimination with adjustable frequency for professional treasure hunting operations across challenging terrain.
metaDescription: GoldXtra long-range locators in Pakistan — Target 2000, Deep Hunter, and the full GoldXtra range.

showcase.tagline: Specialist long-range locator manufacturer focused on deep-target detection.
showcase.description: Specialist long-range locator manufacturer focused on deep-target detection over large search areas. GoldXtra systems combine directional discrimination with adjustable frequency for professional treasure hunting operations across challenging terrain.
